entity.summary: Brazil-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded on December 10, 2014, providing BRL-denominated crypto trading and related digital-asset services through its active official platform.
entity.notes: Official anniversary material gives an exact founding date of December 10, 2014. Current official and independent exchange profiles confirm the continuing Foxbit trading service in Brazil.

expected.summary: Brazil-based centralized exchange launched in 2014 and still operating under the Foxbit brand.

changes.summary: Brazil-based centralized cryptocurrency exchange founded on December 10, 2014, providing BRL-denominated crypto trading and related digital-asset services through its active official platform.
changes.notes: Official anniversary material gives an exact founding date of December 10, 2014. Current official and independent exchange profiles confirm the continuing Foxbit trading service in Brazil.

events.title: Foxbit was founded
events.description: Foxbit was founded in Brazil on 2014-12-10 as a cryptocurrency exchange.
events.notes: Exact founding date is stated in Foxbit's official anniversary history.

events.title: Foxbit completed a Series A led by OK Group
events.description: Foxbit completed a US$20 million Series A financing round led by OK Group to expand its Brazilian exchange and related digital-asset services.
events.notes: The financing expanded Foxbit's operations; it did not change the exchange's active status.

evidence.title: Foxbit: 4 anos de muita história
evidence.notes: Official anniversary article states that Foxbit was founded on 2014-12-10.

evidence.title: Conheça a Foxbit
evidence.notes: Official help-center profile states that Foxbit was created in 2014 and remains an exchange service.

evidence.title: Foxbit official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current Foxbit identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for Foxbit
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the Foxbit identity, Brazil registration, and 2014 establishment year.

evidence.title: Foxbit closes a strategic and technological partnership with OK Group and receives investment of US$20 million
evidence.notes: Official announcement states that Foxbit completed a US$20 million Series A led by OK Group.

evidence.title: Foxbit, veterana do bitcoin no Brasil, atrai R$ 100 milhões de gigante chinês
evidence.notes: Independent contemporaneous reporting corroborates the OK Group-led investment and approximate value.
